name: fse-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for ACM ESEC/FSE (Foundations of Software Engineering) submissions published in PACMSE: venue routing among the SE flagships, the journal-style Major Revision cycle, double-anonymous HotCRP submission, empirical-SE evidence and threats-to-validity, open-science data availability, ACM artifact badging, and the PACMSE camera-ready. Grounded in the FSE 2026/2027 researchr calls, the PACMSE journal pages, ACM DL, and dblp checked on 2026-07-09.
